programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he can't recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Eileen
programme.desc: In 1964 Massachusetts, a young secretary becomes enchanted by Rebecca, the glamorous new counselor at the prison where she works. Their budding friendship soon takes a twisted turn when Rebecca reveals a dark secret.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Rory Scovel: Religion, Sex and a Few Things In Between
programme.desc: Scovel takes the stage at Minneapolis' Goodale Theater to offer his observations on disparate subjects.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.sub-title: All That and a Bag of Chips
programme.desc: Karen's reputation as a woman of the law is marred when an accidental muffin incident causes chaos for the team.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar and Emma enjoy Lacey's company in their new hot tub a lot more than Lacey enjoys theirs; the police department introduces Safety Pete.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash wants to make things right with Amira after their lives are turned upside down once again.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie and Cal find themselves facing a dire situation as they look for a missing camper.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

programme.title: Meet the Killer Parents
programme.desc: A young woman fights to escape her boyfriend's family after learning they're planning to groom her to replace their long-dead daughter.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: Motor City mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show and is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Much to the dismay of her fiance, Hannah investigates the discovery of a skeleton found amid the rubble of a building that's undergoing renovation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Twisted Neighbor
programme.desc: A cookbook editor moves into a gossipy neighborhood whose residents are obsessed with an app. When one of the neighbors suddenly disappears, the group chat pinpoints her as the prime suspect.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: When a British ship is sunk in foreign waters, the world's superpowers begin a feverish race to find its cargo: a nuclear submarine control system. And 007 (Roger Moore) is thrust into one of his most riveting adventures as he rushes to join the search ... and prevent global devastation!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Billion Dollar Bluff
programme.desc: An influencer grips the media's attention by helping criminals rob luxurious mansions.

programme.title: 80 for Brady
programme.desc: Four best friends live life to the fullest when they embark on a wild trip to see their hero, Tom Brady, play in the 2017 Super Bowl.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: A dark mentorship forms between Deborah Vance, a legendary Las Vegas comic, and an entitled, outcast 25-year-old comedy writer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: A dark mentorship forms between Deborah Vance, a legendary Las Vegas comic, and an entitled, outcast 25-year-old comedy writer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom moves to Boston to chase her lifelong dream of opening her own business. A chance meeting with charming neurosurgeon Ryle Kincaid soon sparks an intense connection, but as the two fall deeply in love, she begins to see sides of Ryle that remind her of her parents' relationship. When Lily's first love, Atlas Corrigan, suddenly reenters her life, her relationship with Ryle gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Jamaican singer-songwriter Bob Marley overcomes adversity to create revolutionary music that changes the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: A single mother establishes a high-end escort service that matches beautiful young women with the wealthiest and most powerful men in the city. She manages to keep her lifestyle hidden from her kids and others until the FBI starts to investigate her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mongrels
programme.desc: In rural Canada in the 1990s, a Korean family, a widower, his teenage son, and young daughter, attempts to find footing in a new land while navigating the dark forests of grief. Sonny has been hired to eradicate the feral canines plaguing the town, while sensitive Hajoon figures out what it means to be a man. Finally, young Hana, missing her mother, dreams up ways to make her return.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community.

programme.title: An Autumn Romance
programme.desc: A woman tries to save a small, historic hotel from developers, but she soon realizes that the man she's falling for is behind the hotel's development plans.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Site Unseen: An Emma Fielding Mystery
programme.desc: Archaeologist Emma Fielding unearths evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement that predates Jamestown, but the dead body that accompanies it embroils Emma and her students in a different kind of investigation.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: The '70s brought new sounds and icons like Nancy Wilson of Heart and Joan Jett and hard rockers like Wilson and Debbie Harry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Little jesus
programme.desc: Tells the story of Jean who pins his hopes of recovering from his wounds on a miracle: his ten-year-old son.. He is convinced that Loulou is the new Messiah.

programme.title: We Three Kings
programme.desc: A retired musician hatches a plan to bring his three daughters home for Christmas for the first time since their mother's death. Holiday songs and old memories soon make the estranged siblings realize that life is better when they're all together.

programme.title: Under the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Two crabs embark on an epic journey to get home after a storm sweeps them away. Their courage soon unites their families, paving the way for great summers to come.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: A young Bruce Wayne travels to the Far East, where he's trained in the martial arts by Henri Ducard, a member of the mysterious League of Shadows. When Ducard reveals the League's true purpose -- the complete destruction of Gotham City -- Wayne returns to Gotham intent on cleaning up the city without resorting to murder. With the help of Alfred, his loyal butler, and Lucius Fox, a tech expert at Wayne Enterprises, Batman is born.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Wild Goat Surf
programme.desc: In a run-down Okanagan RV park during the summer of 2003, surfing-obsessed 12-year-old skater girl Goat navigates the unbridled, unstructured summer days of youth, dreaming about becoming a surfer.

programme.title: The Forge
programme.desc: A year out of high school with no plans for his future, a boy is challenged by his single mom and a successful businessman to start charting a better course for his life. Through the prayers of his mother and biblical discipleship from his new mentor, he begins discovering God's purpose for his life is so much more than he could hope for or imagine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Four women take their book club to Italy for the fun girls' trip they never had. When things go off the rails and secrets are revealed, their relaxing vacation turns into a once-in-a-lifetime, cross-country adventure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
